query:
-- Find Mooloolaba Osteopathy customer
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Mooloolaba%' OR name LIKE '%Osteopathy%' OR xeroContactName LIKE '%Mooloolaba%';

-- Find All Crops Haulage customer
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%All Crops%' OR name LIKE '%Crops Haulage%' OR xeroContactName LIKE '%All Crops%';

-- Services for Mooloolaba Osteopathy
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.connectionId
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerName LIKE '%Mooloolaba%' OR s.customerName LIKE '%Osteopathy%'
   OR s.customerExternalId IN (SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%Mooloolaba%' OR name LIKE '%Osteopathy%');

-- Services for All Crops Haulage
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.connectionId
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerName LIKE '%All Crops%' OR s.customerName LIKE '%Crops Haulage%'
   OR s.customerExternalId IN (SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%All Crops%' OR name LIKE '%Crops Haulage%');

-- Billing items for Mooloolaba Osteopathy
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.matchStatus, bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.category
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Mooloolaba%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Osteopathy%';

-- Billing items for All Crops Haulage
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.matchStatus, bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.category
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%All Crops%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Crops Haulage%';
